O2_sign_permutation.note: O2 leaves L2 signals identical because they never use sign identity — so they also carry NO sign/lexical information (the honest caveat).

LA_vs_LB_density.note: corpus-statistic only (NOT an LA model result): LA document density is comparable to LB, so D8 is mild and the L2 structure would be measurable on LA at similar power IF a STRUCTURAL licence were later earned.

interpretation: Do the L2 structural signals survive O2 (trivially — they are sign-agnostic) and D8 (LA-like sparsity)? And what does sign-invariance imply about their information content?
